query:
SELECT LEFT(p.batchNo, 3) AS prefix_code, COUNT(*) AS target_count
FROM `products` p
JOIN `station_tasks` st ON st.`productId` = p.`id`
WHERE st.`stationCode` = 'E'
  AND st.`stationTaskStatus` = 'completed'
  AND (p.`batchNo` LIKE '005%' OR p.`batchNo` LIKE '013%' OR p.`batchNo` LIKE '019%')
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.`metadata`, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) LIKE '/manus-storage/%'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.`metadata`, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) LIKE '/manus-storage/%'
GROUP BY LEFT(p.`batchNo`, 3)
ORDER BY prefix_code;
